<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q20038257]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Railway Shrine''' (鉄道神社)
== Shrines named "Railway Shrine" == * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja|鉄道神社 (東京都北区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within the {{ill|JR East Tokyo Branch|ja|東日本旅客鉄道東京支社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR East Tokyo Branch|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東日本旅客鉄道首都圏本部|1=East Japan Railway Company, Tōkyō Metropolitan Area Headquarters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11527192}} in Kita Ward, Tokyo. Formerly located on the rooftop of the {{ill|former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|ja|JR東日本本社ビル#旧国鉄本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|1=JR East Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3156958}} in Chiyoda Ward, Tokyo.<ref>{{PDFlink|[http://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/ishii-rabo/data/pdf/199202.pdf 日本の企業と宗教]}} 石井研士</ref> * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|鉄道神社（神奈川県横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in Ōkurayama Park (Ume-en) in Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture. Shrine of the Tokyu Group, enshrined from Ise Grand Shrine. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|ja|鉄道神社 (南牧村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|1=Tetsudo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30936255}} – Shrine near the highest elevation of JR Group railway lines (near Nobeyama Station) in Minamimaki Village, Minamisaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * Railway Shrine (Osaka) – Shrine on the rooftop of the {{ill|JR West Headquarters|ja|JR西日本本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}} in Osaka, Osaka Prefecture. See {{ill|JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|ja|JR西日本本社ビル#鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}}. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|鉄道神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932529}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Hakata City|ja|JR博多シティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Hakata City|1=JR Hakata City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226208}} at Hakata Station in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Oita)|ja|鉄道神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Oita)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22119498}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Ōita City|ja|JRおおいたシティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Ōita City|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アミュプラザおおいた|1=AMU PLAZA OITA|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18335584}} at Ōita Station in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture. * Japan Railway Shrine – Shrine located within the [[:en:Museum Yamato Bunkakan|Yamato Bunkakan]] in Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Adjacent to Nihon Railway Reisha and Iwafune Inari Shrine.<ref>『近畿日本鉄道100th year のあゆみ』p.572 2010th year 近畿日本鉄道</ref> * {{ill|Aizu Railway Shrine|ja|会津鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in front of Ashinomaki-Onsen Station in Aizuwakamatsu City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinano Railway Shrine|ja|しなの鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Karuizawa Station in Karuizawa Town, Kitasaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja|新島々駅鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shinshimashima Station in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja|ひたちなか開運鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Ajigaura Station in Hitachinaka City, Ibaraki Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620010818/https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|title=「キハ222」がご神体 「鉄道神社」誕生祝う レール製鳥居も|newspaper=茨城新聞|date=2021-06-20|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620013558/https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|title=引退車両をご神体に鉄道神社建立 茨城、交通安全御利益PR|newspaper=共同通信|date=2021-06-19|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref>
== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.
== References == {{reflist}}
== See also == * {{ill|Aviation Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|航空神社 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aviation Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 航空神社|1=Aviation Shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30319396}}

Shrine of the Tokyu Group, enshrined from Ise Grand Shrine. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|ja|鉄道神社 (南牧村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|1=Tetsudo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30936255}} – Shrine near the highest elevation of JR Group railway lines (near Nobeyama Station) in Minamimaki Village, Minamisaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * Railway Shrine (Osaka) – Shrine on the rooftop of the {{ill|JR West Headquarters|ja|JR西日本本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}} in Osaka, Osaka Prefecture. See {{ill|JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|ja|JR西日本本社ビル#鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}}. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|鉄道神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932529}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Hakata City|ja|JR博多シティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Hakata City|1=JR Hakata City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226208}} at Hakata Station in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Oita)|ja|鉄道神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Oita)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22119498}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Ōita City|ja|JRおおいたシティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Ōita City|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アミュプラザおおいた|1=AMU PLAZA OITA|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18335584}} at Ōita Station in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture. * Japan Railway Shrine – Shrine located within the [[:en:Museum Yamato Bunkakan|Yamato Bunkakan]] in Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Adjacent to Nihon Railway Reisha and Iwafune Inari Shrine.<ref>『近畿日本鉄道100th year のあゆみ』p.572 2010th year 近畿日本鉄道</ref> * {{ill|Aizu Railway Shrine|ja|会津鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in front of Ashinomaki-Onsen Station in Aizuwakamatsu City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinano Railway Shrine|ja|しなの鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Karuizawa Station in Karuizawa Town, Kitasaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja|新島々駅鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shinshimashima Station in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja|ひたちなか開運鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Ajigaura Station in Hitachinaka City, Ibaraki Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620010818/https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|title=「キハ222」がご神体 「鉄道神社」誕生祝う レール製鳥居も|newspaper=茨城新聞|date=2021-06-20|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620013558/https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|title=引退車両をご神体に鉄道神社建立 茨城、交通安全御利益PR|newspaper=共同通信|date=2021-06-19|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref>
== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q20038257]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:55, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Railway Shrine''' (鉄道神社)
== Shrines named "Railway Shrine" == * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja|鉄道神社 (東京都北区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within the {{ill|JR East Tokyo Branch|ja|東日本旅客鉄道東京支社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR East Tokyo Branch|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東日本旅客鉄道首都圏本部|1=East Japan Railway Company, Tōkyō Metropolitan Area Headquarters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11527192}} in Kita Ward, Tokyo. Formerly located on the rooftop of the {{ill|former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|ja|JR東日本本社ビル#旧国鉄本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|1=JR East Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3156958}} in Chiyoda Ward, Tokyo.<ref>{{PDFlink|[http://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/ishii-rabo/data/pdf/199202.pdf 日本の企業と宗教]}} 石井研士</ref> * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|鉄道神社（神奈川県横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in Ōkurayama Park (Ume-en) in Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture. Shrine of the Tokyu Group, enshrined from Ise Grand Shrine. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|ja|鉄道神社 (南牧村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|1=Tetsudo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30936255}} – Shrine near the highest elevation of JR Group railway lines (near Nobeyama Station) in Minamimaki Village, Minamisaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * Railway Shrine (Osaka) – Shrine on the rooftop of the {{ill|JR West Headquarters|ja|JR西日本本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}} in Osaka, Osaka Prefecture. See {{ill|JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|ja|JR西日本本社ビル#鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}}. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|鉄道神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932529}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Hakata City|ja|JR博多シティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Hakata City|1=JR Hakata City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226208}} at Hakata Station in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Oita)|ja|鉄道神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Oita)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22119498}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Ōita City|ja|JRおおいたシティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Ōita City|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アミュプラザおおいた|1=AMU PLAZA OITA|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18335584}} at Ōita Station in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture. * Japan Railway Shrine – Shrine located within the [[:en:Museum Yamato Bunkakan|Yamato Bunkakan]] in Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Adjacent to Nihon Railway Reisha and Iwafune Inari Shrine.<ref>『近畿日本鉄道100th year のあゆみ』p.572 2010th year 近畿日本鉄道</ref> * {{ill|Aizu Railway Shrine|ja|会津鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in front of Ashinomaki-Onsen Station in Aizuwakamatsu City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinano Railway Shrine|ja|しなの鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Karuizawa Station in Karuizawa Town, Kitasaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja|新島々駅鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shinshimashima Station in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja|ひたちなか開運鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Ajigaura Station in Hitachinaka City, Ibaraki Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620010818/https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|title=「キハ222」がご神体 「鉄道神社」誕生祝う レール製鳥居も|newspaper=茨城新聞|date=2021-06-20|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620013558/https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|title=引退車両をご神体に鉄道神社建立 茨城、交通安全御利益PR|newspaper=共同通信|date=2021-06-19|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref>
== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.

== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.

Formerly located on the rooftop of the {{ill|former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|ja|JR東日本本社ビル#旧国鉄本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|1=JR East Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3156958}} in Chiyoda Ward, Tokyo.<ref>{{PDFlink|[http://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/ishii-rabo/data/pdf/199202.pdf 日本の企業と宗教]}} 石井研士</ref> * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|鉄道神社（神奈川県横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in Ōkurayama Park (Ume-en) in Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture. Shrine of the Tokyu Group, enshrined from Ise Grand Shrine. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|ja|鉄道神社 (南牧村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|1=Tetsudo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30936255}} – Shrine near the highest elevation of JR Group railway lines (near Nobeyama Station) in Minamimaki Village, Minamisaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * Railway Shrine (Osaka) – Shrine on the rooftop of the {{ill|JR West Headquarters|ja|JR西日本本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}} in Osaka, Osaka Prefecture. See {{ill|JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|ja|JR西日本本社ビル#鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}}. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|鉄道神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932529}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Hakata City|ja|JR博多シティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Hakata City|1=JR Hakata City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226208}} at Hakata Station in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Oita)|ja|鉄道神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Oita)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22119498}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Ōita City|ja|JRおおいたシティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Ōita City|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アミュプラザおおいた|1=AMU PLAZA OITA|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18335584}} at Ōita Station in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture. * Japan Railway Shrine – Shrine located within the {{ill|Museum Yamato Bunkakan|en|Museum Yamato Bunkakan|WD=Q3329639|lt=Yamato Bunkakan}} in Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Adjacent to Nihon Railway Reisha and Iwafune Inari Shrine.<ref>『近畿日本鉄道100th year のあゆみ』p.572 2010th year 近畿日本鉄道</ref> * {{ill|Aizu Railway Shrine|ja|会津鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in front of Ashinomaki-Onsen Station in Aizuwakamatsu City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinano Railway Shrine|ja|しなの鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Karuizawa Station in Karuizawa Town, Kitasaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja|新島々駅鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shinshimashima Station in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja|ひたちなか開運鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Ajigaura Station in Hitachinaka City, Ibaraki Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620010818/https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|title=「キハ222」がご神体 「鉄道神社」誕生祝う レール製鳥居も|newspaper=茨城新聞|date=2021-06-20|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620013558/https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|title=引退車両をご神体に鉄道神社建立 茨城、交通安全御利益PR|newspaper=共同通信|date=2021-06-19|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref>
== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鉄道神社]]
'''Railway Shrine''' (鉄道神社)
== Shrines named "Railway Shrine" == * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja|鉄道神社 (東京都北区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Kita, Tokyo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within the {{ill|JR East Tokyo Branch|ja|東日本旅客鉄道東京支社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR East Tokyo Branch|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東日本旅客鉄道首都圏本部|1=East Japan Railway Company, Tōkyō Metropolitan Area Headquarters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11527192}} in Kita Ward, Tokyo. Formerly located on the rooftop of the {{ill|former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|ja|JR東日本本社ビル#旧国鉄本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/former Japanese National Railways Headquarters|1=JR East Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3156958}} in Chiyoda Ward, Tokyo.<ref>{{PDFlink|[http://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/ishii-rabo/data/pdf/199202.pdf 日本の企業と宗教]}} 石井研士</ref> * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja|鉄道神社（神奈川県横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in Ōkurayama Park (Ume-en) in Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture. Shrine of the Tokyu Group, enshrined from Ise Grand Shrine. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|ja|鉄道神社 (南牧村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Minamimaki)|1=Tetsudo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30936255}} – Shrine near the highest elevation of JR Group railway lines (near Nobeyama Station) in Minamimaki Village, Minamisaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * Railway Shrine (Osaka) – Shrine on the rooftop of the {{ill|JR West Headquarters|ja|JR西日本本社ビル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}} in Osaka, Osaka Prefecture. See {{ill|JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|ja|JR西日本本社ビル#鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR West Headquarters#Railway Shrine|1=JR West Japan Headquarters Building|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226320}}. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|ja|鉄道神社 (福岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Fukuoka)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30932529}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Hakata City|ja|JR博多シティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Hakata City|1=JR Hakata City|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11226208}} at Hakata Station in Fukuoka City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Railway Shrine (Oita)|ja|鉄道神社 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Railway Shrine (Oita)|1=Tetsudō Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22119498}} – Shrine located on the rooftop of {{ill|JR Ōita City|ja|JRおおいたシティ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JR Ōita City|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アミュプラザおおいた|1=AMU PLAZA OITA|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18335584}} at Ōita Station in Ōita City, Ōita Prefecture. * Japan Railway Shrine – Shrine located within the {{ill|Museum Yamato Bunkakan|en|Museum Yamato Bunkakan|WD=Q3329639|lt=Yamato Bunkakan|1=Museum Yamato Bunkakan}} in Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Adjacent to Nihon Railway Reisha and Iwafune Inari Shrine.<ref>『近畿日本鉄道100th year のあゆみ』p.572 2010th year 近畿日本鉄道</ref> * {{ill|Aizu Railway Shrine|ja|会津鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located in front of Ashinomaki-Onsen Station in Aizuwakamatsu City, Fukushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinano Railway Shrine|ja|しなの鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Karuizawa Station in Karuizawa Town, Kitasaku District, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja|新島々駅鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshimashima Station Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shinshimashima Station in Matsumoto City, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja|ひたちなか開運鉄道神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachinaka Kaiun Railway Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Ajigaura Station in Hitachinaka City, Ibaraki Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite news|url=https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620010818/https://ibarakinews.jp/news/newsdetail.php?f_jun=16241069152866|title=「キハ222」がご神体 「鉄道神社」誕生祝う レール製鳥居も|newspaper=茨城新聞|date=2021-06-20|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref><ref>{{Cite news|url=https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20210620013558/https://nordot.app/778873326079115264|title=引退車両をご神体に鉄道神社建立 茨城、交通安全御利益PR|newspaper=共同通信|date=2021-06-19|accessdate=2021-06-20|archivedate=2021-06-20}}</ref>
== Shrines closely associated with railways == * {{ill|Kumanodaira Shrine|ja|熊ノ平神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanodaira Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine at former Kumanodaira Station, JR Ichinomiya. * {{ill|Tanna Shrine|ja|丹那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanna Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine honoring those who died constructing the Tanna Tunnel. * {{ill|Shutetsu Shrine|ja|守鐡社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shutetsu Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine dedicated to railway protection in front of Mooka Station. * {{ill|Senmori Inari Shrine|ja|線守稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senmori Inari Shrine|1=Senmori Inari Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11607954}} * {{ill|Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja|鳥越稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Torigoe Inari Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Shrine located within Shimonoe Station. * {{ill|Kayashima Shrine|ja|萱島神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayashima Shrine|1=Kayashima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11620508}} – Shrine located under Kayashima Station in Neyagawa City, Osaka Prefecture. Revived by Keihan Electric Railway during station expansion. * Transportation Shrine – Shrine located within {{ill|Amu Plaza Miyazaki|ja|アミュプラザみやざき|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amu Plaza Miyazaki|1=Amu Plaza Miyazaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104759127}} in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture.
== References == {{reflist}}
